firestore.rules:    }

firestore.rules:    function isValidUserCreate(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['uid', 'email', 'name', 'points', 'streak', 'role']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.keys().size() <= 17 && // to account for all optional fields
firestore.rules:             data.uid is string && data.uid.size() > 0 && data.uid.size() < 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.email is string && data.email.size() > 0 && data.email.size() < 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string && data.name.size() > 0 && data.name.size() < 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.points is number && data.points >= 0 &&
firestore.rules:             data.streak is number && data.streak >= 0 &&
firestore.rules:             data.role in ['user', 'admin'];

firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['uid', 'name', 'points', 'rank']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.keys().size() <= 6 &&
firestore.rules:             data.uid is string && data.uid.size() > 0 && data.uid.size() < 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string && data.name.size() > 0 && data.name.size() < 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.points is number && data.points >= 0 &&
firestore.rules:             data.rank is number && data.rank >= 0;
firestore.rules:    }

firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['userId', 'date', 'questionsSolved', 'accuracy', 'timeSpent', 'pointsEarned']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.keys().size() == 6 &&
firestore.rules:             data.userId is string && data.userId.size() > 0 && data.userId.size() < 100 &&

src/pages/Profile.tsx:              width = MAX_WIDTH;
src/pages/Profile.tsx:            }
src/pages/Profile.tsx:          } else {
src/pages/Profile.tsx:            if (height > MAX_HEIGHT) {

src/pages/Profile.tsx:          }
src/pages/Profile.tsx:
src/pages/Profile.tsx:          canvas.width = width;
src/pages/Profile.tsx:          canvas.height = height;

src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:  
src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:  // Normalize subjectId to match keys in formulasData
src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:  const subjectKey = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:    if (!subjectId) return 'Physics';
src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:    const normalized = subjectId.toLowerCase();
src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:    if (normalized === 'physics') return 'Physics';
src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:    if (normalized === 'chemistry') return 'Chemistry';
src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:    if (normalized === 'maths' || normalized === 'mathematics') return 'Mathematics';

src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:

src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:    });
src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:

src/pages/FormulaSubject.tsx:  const chapters = Object.keys(subjectData.chapters);

src/pages/FormulaChapter.tsx:    if (normalized === 'physics') return 'Physics';
src/pages/FormulaChapter.tsx:    if (normalized === 'chemistry') return 'Chemistry';
src/pages/FormulaChapter.tsx:    if (normalized === 'maths' || normalized === 'mathematics') return 'Mathematics';

src/pages/FormulaChapter.tsx:      data.topics[f.topicKey].total_cards += 1;
src/pages/FormulaChapter.tsx:    });

src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    }

src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:            Review Again

src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          <button 
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:            onClick={() => navigate(-1)}
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          >
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:            Back to Topics
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          </button>
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        </div>
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      </div>
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    );
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  const currentCard = localCards[currentIndex];
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  const handleNext = () => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    setIsFlipped(false);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    if (currentIndex < localCards.length - 1) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      setCurrentIndex(prev => prev + 1);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    } else {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      setIsFinished(true);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  };
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  const handlePrev = () => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    setIsFlipped(false);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    if (currentIndex > 0) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      setCurrentIndex(prev => prev - 1);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  };
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  const updateStatus = (statusKey: 'memorized' | 'need_revision' | 'bookmarked') => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    setLocalCards(prev => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      const newCards = [...prev];
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      const card = { ...newCards[currentIndex] };
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      card.status = { ...card.status };
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      if (statusKey === 'memorized') {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        card.status.memorized = true;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        card.status.need_revision = false;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        card.status.not_seen = false;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      } else if (statusKey === 'need_revision') {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        card.status.need_revision = true;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        card.status.memorized = false;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        card.status.not_seen = false;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      } else if (statusKey === 'bookmarked') {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        card.status.bookmarked = !card.status.bookmarked;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      newCards[currentIndex] = card;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      // Update the global data as well for this session
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      if (card.id.startsWith('CUSTOM-')) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        const customFormulas = customFormulasDB.getCustomFormulas();
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        const index = customFormulas.findIndex(f => f.id === card.id);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        if (index !== -1) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          customFormulas[index].status = card.status;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          customFormulasDB.saveCustomFormulas(customFormulas);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        let globalCard;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        if (chapterKey === 'all') {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          for (const chapter of Object.values(formulasData[subjectKey].chapters)) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:            for (const topic of Object.values(chapter.topics)) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:              const found = topic.cards.find(c => c.id === card.id);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:              if (found) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:                globalCard = found;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:                break;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:              }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:            }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:            if (globalCard) break;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        } else if (topicKey === 'all') {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          // Find the card in the global data
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          for (const topic of Object.values(formulasData[subjectKey].chapters[chapterKey].topics)) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:            const found = topic.cards.find(c => c.id === card.id);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:            if (found) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:              globalCard = found;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:              break;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:            }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        } else {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          globalCard = formulasData[subjectKey].chapters[chapterKey].topics[topicKey].cards.find(c => c.id === card.id);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        if (globalCard) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          globalCard.status = card.status;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:        }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      return newCards;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    });
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  };
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  const handleThumbsUp = () => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    updateStatus('memorized');
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    handleNext();
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  };
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  const handleThumbsDown = () => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    updateStatus('need_revision');
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    handleNext();
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  };
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  const toggleBookmark = () => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    updateStatus('bookmarked');
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  };
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  const handleSaveToNotebook = () => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    if (savedToNotebook[currentIndex]) return;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    notebookDB.addNote({
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      email: user?.email || 'student@example.com',
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      subject: subjectKey,
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      chapter: chapterKey,
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      title: `Formula: ${currentCard.title}`,
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      content: `Definition:\n${currentCard.definition}\n\nFormula:\n${currentCard.formula}\n\nVariables:\n${Object.entries(currentCard.variables).map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${v}`).join('\n')}`
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    });
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    setSavedToNotebook(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentIndex]: true }));
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    toast.success('Saved to your notebook!');
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  };
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  const handleReportSubmit = () => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    if (!reportReason.trim()) {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      toast.error('Please select or enter a reason for reporting');
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      return;
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    }
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    setIsSubmittingReport(true);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    // Simulate network request
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:    setTimeout(() => {
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      setIsSubmittingReport(false);
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:      setShowReportModal(false);

src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:
src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:  return (

src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:          // Ignore clicks on buttons or links

src/pages/FormulaViewer.tsx:

src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const { examId } = useParams();
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const navigate = useNavigate();
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const { setPointsEarned, setCurrentQs } = useUser();
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  // Find the matching exam type from syllabusData
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const examKey = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    if (!examId) return 'JEE Main' as ExamType;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    const normalizedId = examId.toLowerCase().replace(/-/g, '');
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    const found = Object.keys(syllabusData).find(
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      key => key.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '') === normalizedId
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    );
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    return (found as ExamType) || 'JEE Main';
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  }, [examId]);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const examData = syllabusData[examKey];
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const availableSubjects = Object.keys(examData) as SubjectType[];
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const [pyqYear, setPyqYear] = useState<string>('Last 1 Year');
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const [showPyqDropdown, setShowPyqDropdown] = useState(false);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<string>('Home');

src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  // Generate mock chapters based on the real syllabus data for the active subject
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const currentChapters = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    if (activeTab === 'Home') return [];
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    const subjectChapters = examData[activeTab as SubjectType] || [];
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    const subjectData = pyqData[pyqYear]?.[activeTab] || { solved: 0, total: 0 };
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    const numChapters = subjectChapters.length;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    // Distribute questions roughly evenly among chapters
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    const baseTotalQs = Math.floor(subjectData.total / numChapters);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    const baseSolvedQs = Math.floor(subjectData.solved / numChapters);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    let remainingTotal = subjectData.total - (baseTotalQs * numChapters);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    let remainingSolved = subjectData.solved - (baseSolvedQs * numChapters);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    return subjectChapters.map((chapterName, index) => {
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      const classLevel = index % 2 === 0 ? '11th' : '12th';
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      const unitNum = (index % 5) + 1;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      let totalQs = baseTotalQs;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      if (remainingTotal > 0) {
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        totalQs++;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        remainingTotal--;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      }
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      let solvedQs = baseSolvedQs;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      if (remainingSolved > 0) {
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        solvedQs++;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        remainingSolved--;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      }
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      const correctQs = Math.floor(solvedQs * (0.4 + (index % 5) * 0.1)); // Random accuracy between 40% and 80%
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      const accuracy = solvedQs > 0 ? ((correctQs / solvedQs) * 100).toFixed(2) : '0.00';
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      const beginnerQs = Math.floor(totalQs * 0.3);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      const targetMainQs = Math.floor(totalQs * 0.5);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      const advanceQs = totalQs - beginnerQs - targetMainQs;
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      const mustDoQs = Math.floor(totalQs * 0.4);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      return {
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        id: `c${index}`,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        name: chapterName,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        totalQs,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        solvedQs,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        correctQs,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        accuracy,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        beginnerQs,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        targetMainQs,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        advanceQs,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        mustDoQs,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        trend: { year: 2025, count: 10 + (index % 10), up: index % 2 === 0 },
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        class: classLevel,
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:        unit: `Unit ${unitNum}`
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:      };
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:    });
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  }, [activeTab, examData, pyqYear]);
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/ExamDashboard.tsx:  const filteredAndSortedChapters = useMemo(() => {

src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  // History for Undo/Redo
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  const [history, setHistory] = useState<AvatarConfig[]>([avatarConfig || DEFAULT_CONFIG]);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  const [historyIndex, setHistoryIndex] = useState(0);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  const avatarSvg = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    const avatar = createAvatar(avataaars, {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      ...(config as any),
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      size: 256,
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    });
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    return avatar.toDataUri();
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  }, [config]);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  const handleSave = async () => {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    setAvatarConfig(config);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    setProfilePic(avatarSvg);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    navigate('/app/profile');
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  };
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  const updateConfig = (key: keyof AvatarConfig, value: string) => {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    const newConfig = { ...config, [key]: [value] };
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    setConfig(newConfig);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    // Update history
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    const newHistory = history.slice(0, historyIndex + 1);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    newHistory.push(newConfig);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    setHistory(newHistory);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    setHistoryIndex(newHistory.length - 1);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  };
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  const handleUndo = () => {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    if (historyIndex > 0) {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      const newIndex = historyIndex - 1;
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      setHistoryIndex(newIndex);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      setConfig(history[newIndex]);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    }
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  };
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  const handleRedo = () => {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    if (historyIndex < history.length - 1) {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      const newIndex = historyIndex + 1;
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      setHistoryIndex(newIndex);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      setConfig(history[newIndex]);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    }
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  };
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  const handleRandomize = () => {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    const randomConfig: any = { seed: Math.random().toString(36).substring(7) };
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    Object.keys(OPTIONS).forEach((key) => {
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      const options = OPTIONS[key as keyof typeof OPTIONS];
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:      randomConfig[key] = [options[Math.floor(Math.random() * options.length)]];
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    });
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    const newConfig = randomConfig as AvatarConfig;
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    setConfig(newConfig);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    // Update history
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    const newHistory = history.slice(0, historyIndex + 1);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    newHistory.push(newConfig);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    setHistory(newHistory);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:    setHistoryIndex(newHistory.length - 1);
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  };
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:  const activeCategoryData = CATEGORIES.find(c => c.id === activeCategory);

src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:                  }`}

src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:                >
src/pages/AvatarEditor.tsx:                  {!isColor && (

src/pages/Login.tsx:    if (!validateEmail(email)) {
src/pages/Login.tsx:      setError('Please enter a valid email address.');
src/pages/Login.tsx:      return;
src/pages/Login.tsx:    }

src/pages/Login.tsx:      navigate('/app');
src/pages/Login.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
src/pages/Login.tsx:      if (err.code === 'auth/user-not-found' || err.code === 'auth/wrong-password' || err.code === 'auth/invalid-credential') {
src/pages/Login.tsx:        setError('Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.');
src/pages/Login.tsx:      } else if (err.code === 'auth/too-many-requests') {
src/pages/Login.tsx:        setError('Access to this account has been temporarily disabled due to many failed login attempts. You can immediately restore it by resetting your password or you can try again later.');
src/pages/Login.tsx:      } else if (err.message && err.message.includes('Email/Password authentication is not enabled')) {
src/pages/Login.tsx:        setError(err.message);
src/pages/Login.tsx:      } else if (err.code === 'auth/operation-not-allowed') {
src/pages/Login.tsx:        setError('Email/Password authentication is not enabled. Please enable it in the Firebase Console under Authentication > Sign-in method.');
src/pages/Login.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/Login.tsx:        setError('Failed to log in. Please check your internet connection and try again.');
src/pages/Login.tsx:      }
src/pages/Login.tsx:    } finally {
src/pages/Login.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/pages/Login.tsx:    }
src/pages/Login.tsx:  };

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleImageUpload = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (file) {

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      reader.onloadend = () => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        const img = new Image();
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        img.onload = () => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          const MAX_WIDTH = 800;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          const MAX_HEIGHT = 800;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          let width = img.width;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          let height = img.height;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          if (width > height) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:            if (width > MAX_WIDTH) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:              height *= MAX_WIDTH / width;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:              width = MAX_WIDTH;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:            }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          } else {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:            if (height > MAX_HEIGHT) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:              width *= MAX_HEIGHT / height;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:              height = MAX_HEIGHT;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:            }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          canvas.width = width;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          canvas.height = height;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          ctx?.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          setNewSolutionImage(compressedDataUrl);

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        img.src = reader.result as string;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleVote = async (solutionId: string, type: 'up' | 'down') => {

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert("Please log in to vote.");

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      const voteDoc = await getDoc(voteRef);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      const solutionRef = doc(db, 'solutions', solutionId);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      if (voteDoc.exists()) {

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        if (currentVote === type) {

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          await updateDoc(solutionRef, {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:            [type === 'up' ? 'upvotes' : 'downvotes']: increment(-1)
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        } else {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          // Switch vote
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          await setDoc(voteRef, { type, userId: user.uid, solutionId: solutionId });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          await updateDoc(solutionRef, {

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:            [currentVote === 'up' ? 'upvotes' : 'downvotes']: increment(-1)
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        // New vote
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        await setDoc(voteRef, { type, userId: user.uid, solutionId: solutionId });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        await updateDoc(solutionRef, {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          [type === 'up' ? 'upvotes' : 'downvotes']: increment(1)
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert("Failed to record vote.");

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleSaveSolution = async (solutionId: string) => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (!user || user.uid === 'demo') {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert("Please log in to save solutions.");
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      return;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    try {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'savedSolutions'), {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        userId: user.uid,
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        solutionId,
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        savedAt: Date.now()
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert('Solution saved successfully!');
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      console.error("Error saving solution:", error);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert("Failed to save solution.");
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleReportSolution = async (solutionId: string) => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (!user || user.uid === 'demo') {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert("Please log in to report solutions.");
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      return;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    try {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'reports'), {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        solutionId,
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        reporterId: user.uid,
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        createdAt: Date.now(),
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        status: 'pending'
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert('Thank you for reporting. Our team will review this solution.');
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      console.error("Error reporting solution:", error);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert("Failed to report solution.");
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleDeleteSolution = async (solutionId: string) => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (!user || user.uid === 'demo') return;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    try {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'solutions', solutionId));
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      console.error("Error deleting solution:", error);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert("Failed to delete solution.");
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleDeleteReply = async (solutionId: string, replyId: string) => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (!user || user.uid === 'demo') return;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    try {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, `solutions/${solutionId}/replies`, replyId));
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'solutions', solutionId), {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        repliesCount: increment(-1)
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      console.error("Error deleting reply:", error);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      alert("Failed to delete reply.");
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    // Reset solution view when changing questions
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setShowSolution(isSubmitted);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    // Mark as visited if unvisited
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (!questionStates[currentQuestion.id]) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      setQuestionStates(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: 'unvisited' }));
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  }, [currentIndex, currentQuestion.id, isSubmitted, questionStates]);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const isTimerPaused = showScratchpad || showPalette || showReport || showSubmitConfirm || showAddSolution || showSolution || isSubmitted;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const [overallTime, setOverallTime] = useState(0); 
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const totalDuration = MOCK_QUESTIONS.length * 60; // 1 min per question for countdown
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (isSubmitted || isTimerPaused) return;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const timer = setInterval(() => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      setOverallTime(prev => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        const nextTime = prev + 1;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        // Auto-submit if time runs out in DPQuiz mode
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        if (isQuizActive && nextTime >= totalDuration && !showReport) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          handleDppSubmit();
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        return nextTime;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      setTimeSpent(prev => ({
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        ...prev,
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        [currentQuestion.id]: (prev[currentQuestion.id] || 0) + 1
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      }));
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }, 1000);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    return () => clearInterval(timer);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  }, [currentQuestion.id, isSubmitted, isTimerPaused, isQuizActive, showReport]);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const formatOverallTime = () => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    let secondsRemaining = overallTime;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (isQuizActive) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      secondsRemaining = Math.max(0, totalDuration - overallTime);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const mins = Math.floor(secondsRemaining / 60);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const secs = secondsRemaining % 60;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    return `${mins.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const secs = seconds % 60;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    return `${mins.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleOptionSelect = (index: number) => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (isSubmitted && !isQuizActive) return;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setUserAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: index }));
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (isQuizActive) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      setQuestionStates(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentQuestion.id]: 'attempted' }));
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async () => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (selectedOption === null) return;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const isCorrect = selectedOption === currentQuestion.correctAnswer;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setQuestionStates(prev => ({
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      ...prev,
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      [currentQuestion.id]: isCorrect ? 'correct' : 'incorrect'
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }));
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setShowSolution(true);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    // Calculate points
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const currentAttempts = attempts[currentQuestion.id] || 0;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    let points = 0;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (isCorrect) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      if (currentAttempts === 0) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        points = 10;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        points = 5;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    // Save activity
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const timeInMinutes = Math.round((timeSpent[currentQuestion.id] || 0) / 60);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const qsCount = currentAttempts === 0 ? 1 : 0; // Only count as new question on first attempt
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    await saveActivity(qsCount, isCorrect ? 100 : 0, timeInMinutes, points);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleDppSubmit = async () => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    let correct = 0;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    let incorrect = 0;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    let unattempted = 0;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const newQuestionStates = { ...questionStates };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    MOCK_QUESTIONS.forEach(q => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      const ans = userAnswers[q.id];
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      if (ans === undefined) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        unattempted++;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      } else if (ans === q.correctAnswer) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        correct++;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        newQuestionStates[q.id] = 'correct';
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        incorrect++;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        newQuestionStates[q.id] = 'incorrect';
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setQuestionStates(newQuestionStates);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const totalScore = (correct * 4) - (incorrect * 1);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setDppScore({
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      correct,
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      incorrect,
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      unattempted,
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      totalScore
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const totalTimeSeconds = Object.values(timeSpent).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    const totalTimeMinutes = Math.round(totalTimeSeconds / 60);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    await saveActivity(correct, correct * 100, totalTimeMinutes, totalScore);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setShowSubmitConfirm(false);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setShowReport(true);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleClear = () => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setUserAnswers(prev => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      const newAnswers = { ...prev };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      delete newAnswers[currentQuestion.id];
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      return newAnswers;
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    });
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const toggleBookmark = (id: number) => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    setBookmarked(prev => ({ ...prev, [id]: !prev[id] }));
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handleNext = () => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (currentIndex < MOCK_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      setCurrentIndex(currentIndex + 1);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  const handlePrev = () => {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    if (currentIndex > 0) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:      setCurrentIndex(currentIndex - 1);
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    }
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  };
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:  if (showReport) {
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:    return (
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        <motion.div
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9 }}
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:        >
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-brand to-blue-500"></div>

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:            </div>
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          </div>
src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:                </div>

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:                </div>

src/pages/PracticeMCQScreen.tsx:          key={currentQuestion.id}

src/pages/Signup.tsx:import { motion } from 'motion/react';
src/pages/Signup.tsx:import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';

src/pages/Signup.tsx:import { useUser } from '../context/UserContext';
src/pages/Signup.tsx:
src/pages/Signup.tsx:const Signup = () => {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const navigate = useNavigate();
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const { loginWithGoogle, loginWithGithub, signupWithEmail, loginAsDemo } = useUser();
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState('');
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const [name, setName] = useState('');
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
src/pages/Signup.tsx:
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const validateEmail = (email: string) => {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    return String(email)
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      .toLowerCase()
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      .match(
src/pages/Signup.tsx:        /^(([^<>()[\]\\.,;:\s@"]+(\.[^<>()[\]\\.,;:\s@"]+)*)|(".+"))@((\[[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\])|(([a-zA-Z\-0-9]+\.)+[a-zA-Z]{2,}))$/
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      );
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  };
src/pages/Signup.tsx:
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const validatePassword = (password: string) => {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    // Requires at least 8 characters, one number, one uppercase and one lowercase letter
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    const re = /^(?=.*\d)(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z]).{8,}$/;
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    return re.test(password);
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  };
src/pages/Signup.tsx:
src/pages/Signup.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    if (!validateEmail(email)) {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      setError('Please enter a valid email address.');
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      return;
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    }
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    if (!validatePassword(password)) {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      setError('Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.');
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      return;
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    }
src/pages/Signup.tsx:
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      setError('');
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      setLoading(true);
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      await signupWithEmail(email, password, name);
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      navigate('/app');
src/pages/Signup.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      if (err.code === 'auth/email-already-in-use') {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:        setError('This email is already in use by another account. Please log in instead.');
src/pages/Signup.tsx:      } else if (err.code === 'auth/weak-password') {
src/pages/Signup.tsx:        setError('Password should be at least 6 characters.');

src/pages/Signup.tsx:    }

src/data/syllabus.ts:export const getChaptersForExam = (exam: ExamType): Chapter[] => {
src/data/syllabus.ts:  const examData = syllabusData[exam];
src/data/syllabus.ts:  if (!examData) return [];
src/data/syllabus.ts:
src/data/syllabus.ts:  const chapters: Chapter[] = [];
src/data/syllabus.ts:  let idCounter = 1;
src/data/syllabus.ts:
src/data/syllabus.ts:  Object.entries(examData).forEach(([subject, subjectChapters]) => {
src/data/syllabus.ts:    (subjectChapters as string[]).forEach((chapterName) => {
src/data/syllabus.ts:      chapters.push({
src/data/syllabus.ts:        id: `${exam.replace(/\s+/g, '')}-${subject}-${idCounter++}`,
src/data/syllabus.ts:        name: chapterName,
src/data/syllabus.ts:        subject: subject as SubjectType,
src/data/syllabus.ts:      });
src/data/syllabus.ts:    });
src/data/syllabus.ts:  });
src/data/syllabus.ts:
src/data/syllabus.ts:  return chapters;
src/data/syllabus.ts:};

src/components/TestEngine/SolutionViewer.tsx:      } else {

src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:const TestCountdown: React.FC<TestCountdownProps> = ({ onComplete }) => {

src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:    if (count > 0) {
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:      const timer = setTimeout(() => setCount(count - 1), 1000);
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:    } else {
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:      const timer = setTimeout(onComplete, 500);
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:    }
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:  }, [count, onComplete]);
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:  return (

src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:          initial={{ y: 20, opacity: 0 }}
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:          animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:          className="mb-6"
src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:        >

src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:

src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:            <motion.div

src/components/TestEngine/TestCountdown.tsx:              animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }}

src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const defaultSubjects = testData.exam === 'NEET' ? ['Physics', 'Chemistry', 'Biology'] : ['Physics', 'Chemistry', 'Mathematics'];
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const subjects = testData.subjects || defaultSubjects;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const duration = testData.duration || (testData.exam === 'NEET' ? 200 : 180);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const questionCount = testData.questionCount || (testData.exam === 'NEET' ? 200 : 90);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const [currentSubject, setCurrentSubject] = useState<SubjectType>(subjects[0]);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const [currentQuestionIndex, setCurrentQuestionIndex] = useState(0);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const [timeLeft, setTimeLeft] = useState(duration * 60);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string | number>>({});
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const [markedForReview, setMarkedForReview] = useState<string[]>([]);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const [showNavModal, setShowNavModal] = useState(false);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const [showSubmitModal, setShowSubmitModal] = useState(false);

src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const [showScratchpad, setShowScratchpad] = useState(false);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  // Mock questions generation
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const questions: Question[] = React.useMemo(() => {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    const qCount = questionCount;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    const subCount = subjects.length;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    const qPerSub = Math.floor(qCount / subCount);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    const remainder = qCount % subCount;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    return subjects.flatMap((sub: SubjectType, subIdx: number) => {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:      const count = qPerSub + (subIdx < remainder ? 1 : 0);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:      return Array.from({ length: count }).map((_, i) => {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        let year = testData.year;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        if (!year) {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          if (testData.yearFilter === 'Specific' && testData.specificYears?.length > 0) {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:            year = testData.specificYears[Math.floor(Math.random() * testData.specificYears.length)];
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          } else if (testData.yearFilter === 'Last 5 Years') {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:            year = 2020 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 6);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          } else {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:            year = 2010 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 16);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          }
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        }
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        const source = testData.isPYQ || testData.year ? 'PYQ' : (testData.source || 'Practice');
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        return {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          id: `${sub}-${i}`,
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          type: i % 5 === 0 ? 'Numerical' : 'MCQ',
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          subject: sub,
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          text: `[${source} ${year}] This is a sample question for ${sub}. What is the correct approach to solve this problem involving multiple concepts?`,
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          options: i % 5 === 0 ? undefined : ['Option A is correct', 'Option B is incorrect', 'Option C is partially correct', 'Option D is definitely wrong'],
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          correctAnswer: i % 5 === 0 ? 42 : 'Option A is correct',
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          explanation: 'Step by step explanation goes here...',
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          points: 4
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        };
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:      });
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    });
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  }, [testData, questionCount, subjects]);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const currentQuestion = questions[currentQuestionIndex];
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    if (isPaused || isCountdownActive) return;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:

src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:      setTimeLeft((prev) => {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        if (prev <= 0) {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          clearInterval(timer);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          handleSubmit();
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:          return 0;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        }
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:        return prev - 1;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:      });
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    }, 1000);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    return () => clearInterval(timer);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  }, [isPaused, isCountdownActive]);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    const h = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    const m = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    const s = seconds % 60;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    return `${h > 0 ? h + ':' : ''}${m.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${s.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  };
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const handleAnswer = (answer: string | number) => {

src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const toggleMarkForReview = () => {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    if (markedForReview.includes(currentQuestion.id)) {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:      setMarkedForReview(markedForReview.filter(id => id !== currentQuestion.id));
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    } else {
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:      setMarkedForReview([...markedForReview, currentQuestion.id]);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:    }

src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:  const handleNext = () => {

src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:      setCurrentQuestionIndex(currentQuestionIndex + 1);
src/components/TestEngine/TestInterface.tsx:      setCurrentSubject(questions[currentQuestionIndex + 1].subject);

src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'Overall' | SubjectType>('Overall');
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  // Calculate stats
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const filteredQuestions = activeTab === 'Overall' 
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:    ? results.questions 
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:    : results.questions.filter((q: any) => q.subject === activeTab);
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const totalQuestions = filteredQuestions.length;
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const attempted = filteredQuestions.filter((q: any) => results.answers[q.id] !== undefined).length;
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const correct = filteredQuestions.filter((q: any) => String(results.answers[q.id]) === String(q.correctAnswer)).length;
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const incorrect = attempted - correct;
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const accuracy = attempted > 0 ? Math.round((correct / attempted) * 100) : 0;
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const score = correct * 4 - incorrect * 1; // Assuming +4, -1 marking
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const subjects = Array.from(new Set(results.questions.map((q: any) => q.subject))) as SubjectType[];
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  const subjectBreakdownData = subjects.map(sub => {
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:    const questions = results.questions.filter((q: any) => q.subject === sub);
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:    const attemptedQ = questions.filter((q: any) => results.answers[q.id] !== undefined).length;
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:    const correctQ = questions.filter((q: any) => String(results.answers[q.id]) === String(q.correctAnswer)).length;
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:    const incorrectQ = attemptedQ - correctQ;
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:    const unattemptedQ = questions.length - attemptedQ;
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:    return {
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:      name: sub,
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:      Correct: correctQ,
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:      Incorrect: incorrectQ,
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:      Unattempted: unattemptedQ,
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:    };
src/components/TestEngine/TestReport.tsx:  });

src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:  const resizeCanvas = useCallback(() => {

src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    const container = containerRef.current;
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    if (!canvas || !container) return;

src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    // Save current image data

src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    let imageData: ImageData | null = null;

src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    canvas.height = height;

src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:  const redrawCanvas = (strokes: Stroke[]) => {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    const ctx = canvas?.getContext('2d');
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    if (!canvas || !ctx) return;
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    ctx.lineCap = 'round';
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:    strokes.forEach(stroke => {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      if (stroke.points.length === 0) return;
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      ctx.beginPath();
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      if (stroke.type === 'line' && stroke.points.length > 1) {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(stroke.points[0].x, stroke.points[0].y);
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.lineTo(stroke.points[stroke.points.length - 1].x, stroke.points[stroke.points.length - 1].y);
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      } else if (stroke.type === 'rectangle' && stroke.points.length > 1) {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        const start = stroke.points[0];
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        const end = stroke.points[stroke.points.length - 1];
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.rect(start.x, start.y, end.x - start.x, end.y - start.y);
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(stroke.points[0].x, stroke.points[0].y);
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        if (stroke.points.length === 1) {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:          ctx.lineTo(stroke.points[0].x, stroke.points[0].y);
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        } else {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:          for (let i = 1; i < stroke.points.length - 1; i++) {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:            const xc = (stroke.points[i].x + stroke.points[i + 1].x) / 2;
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:            const yc = (stroke.points[i].y + stroke.points[i + 1].y) / 2;
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(stroke.points[i].x, stroke.points[i].y, xc, yc);
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:          }
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:          ctx.lineTo(stroke.points[stroke.points.length - 1].x, stroke.points[stroke.points.length - 1].y);
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        }
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      }
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      if (stroke.isEraser) {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'destination-out';
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.lineWidth = stroke.width * 5; // Eraser is thicker
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.strokeStyle = stroke.color;
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.lineWidth = stroke.width;
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:        ctx.globalAlpha = stroke.isHighlighter ? (stroke.opacity || 0.4) : 1;

src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:

src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      color,
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      width: mode === 'highlighter' ? 20 : lineWidth,
src/components/Scratchpad.tsx:      isEraser: mode === 'eraser',

src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:import { Bold, Italic, List, ListOrdered } from 'lucide-react';
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:interface MarkdownEditorProps {
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:  value: string;
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:  onChange: (val: string) => void;
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:  placeholder?: string;
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:}
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:const MarkdownEditor: React.FC<MarkdownEditorProps> = ({ value, onChange, placeholder }) => {
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:  const textareaRef = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null);
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:  const insertText = (before: string, after: string = '') => {
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    if (!textareaRef.current) return;
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    const start = textareaRef.current.selectionStart;
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    const end = textareaRef.current.selectionEnd;
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    const text = textareaRef.current.value;
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    const selectedText = text.substring(start, end);
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    const replacement = before + selectedText + after;
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    onChange(text.substring(0, start) + replacement + text.substring(end));
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    setTimeout(() => {
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:      if (textareaRef.current) {
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        textareaRef.current.focus();
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        textareaRef.current.setSelectionRange(start + before.length, end + before.length);
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:      }
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    }, 0);
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:  };
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:  return (
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:          <Bold size={16} />
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        </button>
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:          <Italic size={16} />
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        </button>
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:          <List size={16} />
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        </button>
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:          <ListOrdered size={16} />
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        </button>
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:      </div>
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:      <textarea
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        ref={textareaRef}
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        value={value}
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        placeholder={placeholder}
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:        rows={10}
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:      />
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:    </div>
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:  );
src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx:};

src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  const [subject, setSubject] = useState('');
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  const [chapter, setChapter] = useState('');
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  const [title, setTitle] = useState('');
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  const [content, setContent] = useState('');
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  const [tags, setTags] = useState<string[]>([]);
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  const [tagInput, setTagInput] = useState('');

src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:      const notes = notebookDB.getNotes();
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:      const found = notes.find(n => n.id === Number(id));
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:      if (found) {
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:        setSubject(found.subject);
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:        setChapter(found.chapter);
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:        setTitle(found.title);
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:        setContent(found.content);

src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  }, [id]);
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:

src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:      e.preventDefault();
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:      if (!tags.includes(tagInput.trim())) {
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:        setTags([...tags, tagInput.trim()]);
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:      }
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:      setTagInput('');

src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  };
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:
src/modules/notebook/EditNote.tsx:  const handleSave = () => {

src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:  const toggleTag = (tag: string) => {
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:    setSelectedTags(prev => 
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:      prev.includes(tag) ? prev.filter(t => t !== tag) : [...prev, tag]

src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:  };
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:  const filteredNotes = notes.filter(n => {

src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:                          n.content.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase());
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:    const matchesSubject = filterSubject === 'All' || n.subject === filterSubject;
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:    const matchesTags = selectedTags.length === 0 || selectedTags.every(tag => (n.tags || []).includes(tag));
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:    
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:    return matchesSearch && matchesSubject && matchesTags;
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:  });
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:
src/modules/notebook/NotebookHome.tsx:  return (

src/firebase.ts:export interface FirestoreErrorInfo {
src/firebase.ts:  error: string;
src/firebase.ts:  operationType: 'create' | 'update' | 'delete' | 'list' | 'get' | 'write';
src/firebase.ts:  path: string | null;
src/firebase.ts:  authInfo: {
src/firebase.ts:    userId: string;
src/firebase.ts:    email: string;
src/firebase.ts:    emailVerified: boolean;
src/firebase.ts:    isAnonymous: boolean;

src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:}
src/firebase.ts:
src/firebase.ts:export function handleFirestoreError(error: any, operationType: string, path: string | null = null): never {
src/firebase.ts:  if (error?.message?.includes('Missing or insufficient permissions')) {
src/firebase.ts:    const currentUser = auth.currentUser;
src/firebase.ts:    const errorInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
src/firebase.ts:      error: error.message,
src/firebase.ts:      operationType: operationType as any,
src/firebase.ts:      path,
src/firebase.ts:      authInfo: {
src/firebase.ts:        userId: currentUser?.uid || '',
src/firebase.ts:        email: currentUser?.email || '',
src/firebase.ts:        emailVerified: currentUser?.emailVerified || false,
src/firebase.ts:        isAnonymous: currentUser?.isAnonymous || true,
src/firebase.ts:        providerInfo: currentUser?.providerData.map(p => ({
src/firebase.ts:          providerId: p.providerId,
src/firebase.ts:          displayName: p.displayName || '',
src/firebase.ts:          email: p.email || ''
src/firebase.ts:        })) || []
src/firebase.ts:      }
src/firebase.ts:    };
src/firebase.ts:    throw new Error(JSON.stringify(errorInfo));
src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:  throw error;
src/firebase.ts:}

src/context/UserContext.tsx:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData.map(provider => ({

src/context/UserContext.tsx:        displayName: provider.displayName,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        email: provider.email,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        photoUrl: provider.photoURL
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      })) || []
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    },
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    operationType,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    path
src/context/UserContext.tsx:  }
src/context/UserContext.tsx:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/context/UserContext.tsx:  throw new Error(JSON.stringify(errInfo));

src/context/UserContext.tsx:
src/context/UserContext.tsx:  const saveActivity = async (questionsSolved: number, accuracy: number, timeSpent: number, points: number, chapterId?: string) => {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    if (!user) return;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    if (user.uid === 'demo') {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      setCurrentQs(prev => prev + questionsSolved);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      setDailyPoints(prev => prev + points);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      setPointsEarned(prev => prev + points);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      return;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    }
src/context/UserContext.tsx:
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    const today = new Date();
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    const dateStr = today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    try {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      const activityRef = doc(db, `users/${user.uid}/activity`, dateStr);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      const activityDoc = await getDoc(activityRef);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      let prevQs = 0;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      let newQs = questionsSolved;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      if (activityDoc.exists()) {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        const data = activityDoc.data();
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        prevQs = data.questionsSolved || 0;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        const prevAcc = data.accuracy || 0;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        const prevTime = data.timeSpent || 0;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        const prevPoints = data.pointsEarned || 0;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        newQs = prevQs + questionsSolved;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        const newAcc = newQs === 0 ? 0 : Math.round((prevAcc * prevQs + accuracy * questionsSolved) / newQs);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        await setDoc(activityRef, {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          userId: user.uid,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          date: dateStr,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          questionsSolved: newQs,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          accuracy: newAcc,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          timeSpent: prevTime + timeSpent,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          pointsEarned: prevPoints + points
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        }, { merge: true });
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      } else {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        await setDoc(activityRef, {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          userId: user.uid,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          date: dateStr,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          questionsSolved,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          accuracy,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          timeSpent,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          pointsEarned: points
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        });
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      }
src/context/UserContext.tsx:
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      // Update user points and chapter progress
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      const userRef = doc(db, 'users', user.uid);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      const userDoc = await getDoc(userRef);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      if (userDoc.exists()) {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        const userData = userDoc.data();
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        const newPoints = (userData.points || 0) + points;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        let newChapterProgress = userData.chapterProgress || {};
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        if (chapterId) {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          const currentChapter = newChapterProgress[chapterId] || { completed: false, accuracy: 0, score: 0, questionsSolved: 0 };
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          const newChapQs = currentChapter.questionsSolved + questionsSolved;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          const newChapAcc = newChapQs === 0 ? 0 : Math.round((currentChapter.accuracy * currentChapter.questionsSolved + accuracy * questionsSolved) / newChapQs);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          newChapterProgress = {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:            ...newChapterProgress,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:            [chapterId]: {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:              ...currentChapter,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:              questionsSolved: newChapQs,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:              accuracy: newChapAcc,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:              score: currentChapter.score + points,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:              completed: newChapQs >= 5 // Example threshold for completion
src/context/UserContext.tsx:            }
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          };
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        }
src/context/UserContext.tsx:
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        let newStreak = userData.streak || 0;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        let lastCompletedDate = userData.lastCompletedDate;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        if (newQs >= dailyGoal && prevQs < dailyGoal) {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          const yesterday = new Date();
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          const yesterdayStr = yesterday.toISOString().split('T')[0];
src/context/UserContext.tsx:
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          if (lastCompletedDate === yesterdayStr) {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:            newStreak += 1;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          } else if (lastCompletedDate !== dateStr) {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:            newStreak = 1;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          }
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          lastCompletedDate = dateStr;
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        }
src/context/UserContext.tsx:
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        await setDoc(userRef, {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          uid: user.uid,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          email: userData.email || user.email,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          name: userData.name || user.name,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          points: newPoints,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          streak: newStreak,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          lastCompletedDate: lastCompletedDate || null,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          role: userData.role || 'user',
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          rank: userData.rank !== undefined ? userData.rank : 1000,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          chapterProgress: newChapterProgress
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        }, { merge: true });
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        // Update public profile
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        await setDoc(doc(db, 'users_public', user.uid), {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          uid: user.uid,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          name: userData.name || user.name,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          points: newPoints,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          rank: userData.rank !== undefined ? userData.rank : 1000,
src/context/UserContext.tsx:          ...(userData.profilePic ? { profilePic: userData.profilePic } : {})
src/context/UserContext.tsx:        }, { merge: true });
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      }
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/context/UserContext.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, `users/${user.uid}/activity/${dateStr}`);
src/context/UserContext.tsx:    }
src/context/UserContext.tsx:  };
src/context/UserContext.tsx:

src/utils/analysis.ts:export interface TestReport {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  id: string;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  email: string;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  testId: string;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  subject: string;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  chapter: string;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  correct: number;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  wrong: number;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  skipped: number;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  total: number;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  score: number;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  timeTaken: number;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  date: string;
src/utils/analysis.ts:}
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:export function overallStats(reports: TestReport[]) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  let correct = 0;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  let wrong = 0;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  let total = 0;
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:  reports.forEach(r => {
src/utils/analysis.ts:    correct += r.correct;
src/utils/analysis.ts:    wrong += r.wrong;
src/utils/analysis.ts:    total += r.total;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  });
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:  const accuracy = total > 0 ? ((correct / total) * 100).toFixed(2) : '0.00';
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:  return { correct, wrong, total, accuracy };
src/utils/analysis.ts:}
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:export function subjectStats(reports: TestReport[]) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  const subjects: Record<string, { correct: number; total: number }> = {};
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:  reports.forEach(r => {
src/utils/analysis.ts:    if (!subjects[r.subject]) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:      subjects[r.subject] = { correct: 0, total: 0 };
src/utils/analysis.ts:    }
src/utils/analysis.ts:    subjects[r.subject].correct += r.correct;
src/utils/analysis.ts:    subjects[r.subject].total += r.total;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  });
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:  return subjects;
src/utils/analysis.ts:}
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:export function chapterStats(reports: TestReport[]) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  const chapters: Record<string, { correct: number; total: number }> = {};
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:  reports.forEach(r => {
src/utils/analysis.ts:    if (!chapters[r.chapter]) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:      chapters[r.chapter] = { correct: 0, total: 0 };
src/utils/analysis.ts:    }
src/utils/analysis.ts:    chapters[r.chapter].correct += r.correct;
src/utils/analysis.ts:    chapters[r.chapter].total += r.total;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  });
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:  return chapters;
src/utils/analysis.ts:}
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:export function weakChapters(chapters: Record<string, { correct: number; total: number }>) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  return Object.entries(chapters)
src/utils/analysis.ts:    .filter(([_, data]) => {
src/utils/analysis.ts:      const acc = data.total > 0 ? (data.correct / data.total) * 100 : 0;
src/utils/analysis.ts:      return acc < 60 && data.total > 0;
src/utils/analysis.ts:    })
src/utils/analysis.ts:    .map(([chapter, data]) => ({
src/utils/analysis.ts:      chapter,
src/utils/analysis.ts:      accuracy: data.total > 0 ? ((data.correct / data.total) * 100).toFixed(2) : '0.00'
src/utils/analysis.ts:    }));
src/utils/analysis.ts:}
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:export function strongChapters(chapters: Record<string, { correct: number; total: number }>) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  return Object.entries(chapters)
src/utils/analysis.ts:    .filter(([_, data]) => {
src/utils/analysis.ts:      const acc = data.total > 0 ? (data.correct / data.total) * 100 : 0;
src/utils/analysis.ts:      return acc >= 80 && data.total > 0;
src/utils/analysis.ts:    })
src/utils/analysis.ts:    .map(([chapter, data]) => ({
src/utils/analysis.ts:      chapter,
src/utils/analysis.ts:      accuracy: data.total > 0 ? ((data.correct / data.total) * 100).toFixed(2) : '0.00'
src/utils/analysis.ts:    }));
src/utils/analysis.ts:}
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:export function timeAnalysis(reports: TestReport[]) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  if (reports.length === 0) return 0;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  let totalTime = 0;
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:  reports.forEach(r => {
src/utils/analysis.ts:    totalTime += r.timeTaken;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  });
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:  const avg = totalTime / reports.length;
src/utils/analysis.ts:  return avg;
src/utils/analysis.ts:}
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:export function accuracyTrend(reports: TestReport[]) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  return reports.map(r => {
src/utils/analysis.ts:    return {
src/utils/analysis.ts:      date: r.date,
src/utils/analysis.ts:      accuracy: r.total > 0 ? (r.correct / r.total) * 100 : 0
src/utils/analysis.ts:    };
src/utils/analysis.ts:  });
src/utils/analysis.ts:}
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:export function saveTestReport(report: Omit<TestReport, 'id'>) {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  const reports = getTestReports();
src/utils/analysis.ts:  const newReport = { ...report, id: Date.now().toString() };
src/utils/analysis.ts:  reports.push(newReport);
src/utils/analysis.ts:  localStorage.setItem('mark_reports', JSON.stringify(reports));
src/utils/analysis.ts:  return newReport;
src/utils/analysis.ts:}
src/utils/analysis.ts:
src/utils/analysis.ts:export function getTestReports(): TestReport[] {
src/utils/analysis.ts:  const data = localStorage.getItem('mark_reports');
src/utils/analysis.ts:  return data ? JSON.parse(data) : [];
src/utils/analysis.ts:}

src/utils/notebookDB.ts:export const notebookDB = {
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:  getNotes(): Note[] {

src/utils/notebookDB.ts:  },

src/utils/notebookDB.ts:  },
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:  addNote(note: Omit<Note, 'id' | 'date'>) {
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    const notes = this.getNotes();
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    const newNote: Note = {
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:      ...note,
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:      tags: note.tags || [],

src/utils/notebookDB.ts:      date: new Date().toDateString(),
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    };
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    notes.push(newNote);
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    this.saveNotes(notes);
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    return newNote;
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:  },
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:  updateNote(id: number, updatedFields: Partial<Note>) {

src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    const index = notes.findIndex(n => n.id === id);
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    if (index !== -1) {
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:      notes[index] = { ...notes[index], ...updatedFields };
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:      this.saveNotes(notes);
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    }
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:  },
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:  deleteNote(id: number) {
src/utils/notebookDB.ts:    let notes = this.getNotes();

reverse_fix.cjs:const fs = require('fs');
reverse_fix.cjs:const path = require('path');
reverse_fix.cjs:
reverse_fix.cjs:function getFiles(dir, files = []) {
reverse_fix.cjs:  const list = fs.readdirSync(dir);
reverse_fix.cjs:  for (let file of list) {
reverse_fix.cjs:    const filePath = path.join(dir, file);
reverse_fix.cjs:    if (fs.statSync(filePath).isDirectory()) {
reverse_fix.cjs:      getFiles(filePath, files);
reverse_fix.cjs:    } else if (filePath.match(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/)) {
reverse_fix.cjs:      files.push(filePath);
reverse_fix.cjs:    }
reverse_fix.cjs:  }
reverse_fix.cjs:  return files;
reverse_fix.cjs:}
reverse_fix.cjs:
reverse_fix.cjs:const files = getFiles('src');
reverse_fix.cjs:for (const file of files) {
reverse_fix.cjs:  let content = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8');
reverse_fix.cjs:  const original = content;
reverse_fix.cjs:
reverse_fix.cjs:  
reverse_fix.cjs:  if (content !== original) {
reverse_fix.cjs:    fs.writeFileSync(file, content);
reverse_fix.cjs:    console.log('Modified', file);
reverse_fix.cjs:  }
reverse_fix.cjs:}
reverse_fix.cjs:
revert_white.cjs:const fs = require('fs');
revert_white.cjs:const path = require('path');
revert_white.cjs:
revert_white.cjs:function replaceInDir(dir) {
revert_white.cjs:  const files = fs.readdirSync(dir);
revert_white.cjs:  for (const file of files) {
revert_white.cjs:    const fullPath = path.join(dir, file);
revert_white.cjs:    if (fs.statSync(fullPath).isDirectory()) {
revert_white.cjs:      replaceInDir(fullPath);
revert_white.cjs:    } else if (fullPath.endsWith('.tsx') || fullPath.endsWith('.ts')) {
revert_white.cjs:      let content = fs.readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf8');
revert_white.cjs:      const original = content;
revert_white.cjs:      
revert_white.cjs:      // Revert bg-slate-900/ to bg-white/
revert_white.cjs:      content = content.replace(/bg-slate-900(\/[0-9]+)/g, 'bg-white$1');
revert_white.cjs:      // Revert bg-slate-900/ to bg-white/
revert_white.cjs:      content = content.replace(/bg-slate-900\/(\[[^\]]+\])/g, 'bg-white/$1');
revert_white.cjs:      
revert_white.cjs:      if (content !== original) {
revert_white.cjs:        fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, content);
revert_white.cjs:      }
revert_white.cjs:    }
revert_white.cjs:  }
revert_white.cjs:}
revert_white.cjs:
revert_white.cjs:replaceInDir('./src');
